creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239269
devel/go-tools: update to 0.5.0

Selected upstream changes:

 - go/ssa/interp: fix conversion of slice to named array
 - go/gcexportdata: preallocate buffer to read into when size is known
 - x/tools: drop support for Go toolchains older than go1.16
 - go/ssa: deref core type in emitLoad
 - go/gcexportdata: drop support for go1.6 export data
 - go/ssa,go/analysis/passes/nilness: refine when type param constants
   are nil
 - go.mod: update golang.org/x dependencies

Changelog: https://github.com/golang/tools/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.1.
Please MFH if possible.
Please leave the selected changes in the commit as upstream does not provide a proper change log.
